channel.title: Aelix
channel.description: Essays on decision markets, futarchy, philosophy, and practical agency.

item.title: Modes of Operation
item.description: Frameworks to help you make decisions

item.title: Decision Market Arbitrage
item.description: Ever wondered how to profit from inefficient futarchy markets? Here's a simple guide to arbitraging decision markets — a mechanism that's still new enough to have simple alpha.

item.title: An Ideal World Approximator
item.description: How to understand the world and make better decisions.
